Rules.InvariantScript:
If(
LatestIncidents.Selected.EmergencyLevel.Value = "low",
ColorValue("#2AF46E"),
LatestIncidents.Selected.EmergencyLevel.Value = "medium",
ColorValue("#FFB92C"),
LatestIncidents.Selected.EmergencyLevel.Value = "high",
ColorValue("#FF5555"),
LatestIncidents.Selected.EmergencyLevel.Value = "critical",
ColorValue("#EF1014"),
ColorValue("#E5E7EB")
)

If(
    LatestIncidents.Selected.Status.Value = "verified",
    "Incident Verified",
    LatestIncidents.Selected.Status.Value = "Rejected",
    "Incident Rejected",
    "Verification Guidance"
)

If(
    LatestIncidents.Selected.Status.Value = "verified",
    "This incident was verified by " &  LatestIncidents.Selected.VerifiedBy & ", on " & LatestIncidents.Selected.VerifiedAt,
    LatestIncidents.Selected.Status.Value = "Rejected",
    "this incident was rejected by " &  LatestIncidents.Selected.VerifiedBy & ", on " & LatestIncidents.Selected.VerifiedAt,
    "Confirm the report details before marking the incident as verified. Rejected reports are discarded."
)
